title: athyrium angustum f. elegans
intro: Athyrium angustum f. elegans, also known as the Lady Fern or Western Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. It is native to North America and is prized for its delicate fronds and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include reducing congestion, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating pain.
